summary: Mixed reception; recording source unknown with fair audio quality and an average show that left reviewers without clear highlights.
review: The two fan reviews present a split view: one calls the performance rough with no memorable moments, while the other praises the band’s inherent strength even on a “worst day” of the summer of ’84. No concrete details about sound clarity or mix are offered, so the recording is treated as an unknown‑source soundboard with fair quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with divergent opinions; one low (2★) and one moderate-high (4★). Lack of technical detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on clarity, balance, or any specific audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on pacing; one reviewer mentioned weather affecting the show and a lack of highlights.
